description.ko: 고요한 심해 속 유기적 나선이 느린 액체 빛을 흘려보내며 빛나는 촉수와 생명의 입자들을 만든다.
description.en: A suspended organic spiral releases slow liquid light into a serene underwater field of glowing tendrils and living particles.

prompt: AURA-7 organic flow artwork, "Abyssal Lumen Gyre": a deep underwater vertical composition centered on a single suspended biomorphic spiral, like a living siphon made of soft #7FB069 translucent tissue with shadowed #2D5A3D ribbed folds. From its open pores, slow streams of #FFE66D liquid light seep outward, curl into long glowing tendrils, and drift upward through dense #E6F2E1 milky seawater. The surrounding abyss is serene and weightless, filled with countless tiny bioluminescent particles, pearl-like microbubbles, faint green caustic rays, and soft suspended organic flakes. Wet gelatinous surfaces, gentle internal glow, flowing liquid illumination, high particle density, no figures, no machinery, no hard geometry, refined cinematic depth, detailed generative art.
